methodsAttempted.query: site:nwsuaf.edu.cn 西北农林科技大学 AIGC 论文 学术诚信 教学
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl search found a legacy official Resource and Environment College page linking the same school AI-use notice PDF as an attachment.
Direct HTTP checks confirmed official subdomain pages and PDF attachment under zhxy.nwafu.edu.cn and life.nwafu.edu.cn. robots.txt returned 404 on checked hosts, so no robots disallow rule was found.
Direct HTML fetch located docs/2025-04/66b284246dad4e5a83bf03ecc68ea435.pdf; Firecrawl PDF scrape extracted the substantive notice text.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery located one primary university-issued PDF notice on undergraduate thesis/design AI use, issued by the Academic Affairs Office and Teaching Development Center. College pages were used for discovery context only where they embedded, linked, or implemented the primary notice.

targets.sourceTitle: 关于在本科毕业论文（设计）中规范使用人工智能（AI）的通知

stopConditions: Stop after the primary Academic Affairs Office and Teaching Development Center PDF supports undergraduate thesis/design AI-use claims.
Do not infer rules for graduate theses, ordinary coursework, research, staff use, procurement, or approved tools.
Do not use college implementation pages as claim evidence when the university-issued PDF is available.
Do not stage raw PDF, HTML, screenshots, or full normalized text in Git.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 关于在本科毕业论文（设计）中规范使用人工智能（AI）的通知

artifacts.claimText: Northwest Agriculture and Forestry University's Academic Affairs Office and Teaching Development Center issued a notice for all colleges on regulating AI use in undergraduate theses and designs, effective from the 2025 graduating undergraduate thesis/design work.

citation.citationTitle: Northwest Agriculture and Forestry University AI Policy Tracker record
citation.publisher: 教务处、教学发展中心（高等教育研究所）
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: For undergraduate theses and designs, Northwest Agriculture and Forestry University prohibits AI tools from doing research scheme design, innovative method design, algorithm framework construction, directly generating major thesis components, or generating or altering original data and original or experimental media results.

citation.citationTitle: Northwest Agriculture and Forestry University AI Policy Tracker record
citation.publisher: 教务处、教学发展中心（高等教育研究所）
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: For undergraduate theses and designs involving confidential content, Northwest Agriculture and Forestry University prohibits using any AI tool and prohibits uploading any data to AI platforms.

citation.citationTitle: Northwest Agriculture and Forestry University AI Policy Tracker record
citation.publisher: 教务处、教学发展中心（高等教育研究所）
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: For undergraduate theses and designs, Northwest Agriculture and Forestry University permits AI use for text polishing and translation only with supervisor consent and guidance, and encourages AI-assisted topic research, literature search, material organization, and format checking.

citation.citationTitle: Northwest Agriculture and Forestry University AI Policy Tracker record
citation.publisher: 教务处、教学发展中心（高等教育研究所）
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: When students use AI tools to assist undergraduate thesis or design work, Northwest Agriculture and Forestry University requires them to disclose the tool name, version, and specific purpose in relevant thesis sections and keep pre- and post-AI-use original materials as appendix materials for review; the school will randomly select some theses or designs for AI-generated-content detection.

citation.citationTitle: Northwest Agriculture and Forestry University AI Policy Tracker record
citation.publisher: 教务处、教学发展中心（高等教育研究所）
citation.sourceRights: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.claimText: Northwest Agriculture and Forestry University's undergraduate thesis/design AI notice states that students bear final responsibility for AI-generated content and that AI tools may not be listed as authors or collaborators.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 各学院： 为规范人工智能（以下简称“AI”）在本科毕业论文（设计）中的使用，保障学术诚信与论文（设计）原创性，防范学术不端，根据学校教学管理相关规定，现将有关事项通知如下：

artifacts.sourceTitle: 关于在本科毕业论文（设计）中规范使用人工智能（AI）的通知
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 禁止使用 AI 工具进行研究方案设计、创新性方法设计、算法框架搭建等影响学生核心能力训练和考察评价的工作，禁止使用 AI 工具直接生成本科毕业论文（设计）的摘要、正文、致谢或其他重要组成部分。禁止使用 AI 工具生成或篡改本科毕业论文（设计）中的原始数据、原创性或实验性的图形、图像、视频等结果。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The notice prohibits AI tools from core design and major thesis-generation tasks and from generating or altering original data or original/experimental media results.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 在指导教师同意与指导的前提下，可使用 AI 对文本部分内容进行语言润色和翻译等。在选题调研、文献检索、资料整理等方面，学生可借助 AI 工具跟踪研究动态、收集整理参考文献、校对格式等，提升研究效率。

citation.publisher: 教务处、教学发展中心（高等教育研究所）

artifacts.sourceTitle: 关于在本科毕业论文（设计）中规范使用人工智能（AI）的通知
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 学生在毕业论文（设计）中使用 AI 工具进行辅助工作，应在研究方法、参考文献、致谢等论文相关部分明确披露所用 AI 工具名称、版本及具体用途，并将 AI 工具使用前后的原始材料作为毕业论文（设计）的附件材料一并提交备查。学校将随机抽取部分论文（设计）进行 AI 生成内容检测。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The notice requires disclosure of tool name, version, and purpose in thesis sections, submission of before/after materials for review, and says the school will randomly select some work for AI-generated-content detection.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.notes: Approved as a source-status claim scoped to the PDF notice and undergraduate thesis/design work.
Approved because the source uses explicit prohibitory language for core AI-generated work and original data/media in undergraduate theses/designs.
Approved because the source explicitly prohibits any AI tool and data upload for confidential undergraduate thesis/design content.
Approved with undergraduate thesis/design scope and limited-use wording tied to supervisor consent and guidance.
Approved because disclosure, appendix-material, and random AI-generated-content detection language is explicit in the PDF.
Approved because the notice directly states student final responsibility and excludes AI tools from authorship or collaboration.

artifacts.title: Northwest Agriculture and Forestry University undergraduate thesis AI-use notice
artifacts.summary: A university-issued Chinese PDF notice from the Academic Affairs Office and Teaching Development Center provides undergraduate thesis/design AI-use rules. Claims are scoped to undergraduate thesis/design work and include prohibitions, confidential-content data handling, limited allowed use, disclosure/detection, and student responsibility.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
This staged run does not infer graduate, staff, research, procurement, or general coursework AI policy from the undergraduate thesis/design notice.
College implementation pages were discovered but not used as canonical claim evidence.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
